site.name: Gemini Builders Community
site.tagline: Building the next generation of AI Builders.
site.description: A student-run AI builder community at United Institute of Technology, Prayagraj — under the Google Student Ambassadors program.

manifesto: Builders over consumers — we create, not just use
Learning is a team sport — share what you know
Ship ugly early — perfect kills momentum
Real problems only — no toy demos, build for impact
India needs its own AI story — we're writing it

roadmap.title: Learn
roadmap.desc: Attend sessions. Read docs. Build your mental model of how AI actually works.

roadmap.title: Experiment
roadmap.desc: Break things on purpose. Test every assumption. Fail fast in your own sandbox.

roadmap.title: Build
roadmap.desc: Ship something real. Ugly is fine. Working beats perfect every single time.

roadmap.title: Share
roadmap.desc: Post what you built. Teach someone else. Knowledge compounds when it moves.

roadmap.title: Lead
roadmap.desc: Run a session. Mentor a new member. Become the person you wished you had.
